system.description:
Discipline: Waijia
Skill: Athletics against Special
Type: Normal
Qi: 1

You jump or fall directly onto your enemy, transferring most of the force of your impact to your foe. To land on your target, roll Athletics skill. If your target is unaware of your presence, the TN is 3. If the target is aware, roll against her Evade. On a Success, your target takes falling Damage equal to the distance of your fall and you take half the normal Damage (round down). The target is also knocked prone. On a Failure, you miss the target completely and you take falling Damage as usual. On a Total Success, you may make a mundane Attack against the target as well. Cathartic: If you succeed in your Athletics roll, you do not take any Damage from the fall. Additionally, on a Total Success you may use a Kung Fu Technique against your target instead of a mundane Attack.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 3: Kung Fu Techniques
system.catharticEffect: If you succeed in your Athletics roll, you do not take any Damage from the fall. Additionally, on a Total Success you may use a Kung Fu Technique against your target instead of a mundane Attack.
